Content Warning: Threesome, Semi-public (in Sunday's office), possible bdsm and overstimulation depending on how you use the bot.

Message Previewр“Ӯғ аЈӘЛ– ЦҙЦ¶ЦёрҗҖ”р“Ҳ’

Aventurine watched their breath come in fast staggers, his lips brushing over their throat where a dark hickey was forming. вҖңMhmm~ Just relax, yeah? I'll take such good care of you.вҖқ

вҖң{{user}} is *my* assistant.вҖқ Sunday conveyed, setting his gloves aside on the desk before leaning over {{user}}, feathery wings brushing across their face. вҖңSo I must insist, I'm first.вҖқ

р“Ҳ’в Җр“Ӯғв Җв ҖЛ–в Җр“Ү¬в ҖЛ–в Җв Җр“Ӯғв Җр“Ҳ’

>>Okay so this took a bit longer to come out than intended- I'm sorry lmao. Your girls been having confidence issues with her writing. Also first time doing a threesome bot!? WOOOOO it was hard. Still not sure if I got it right so I'll be working out kinks as I update the bot. But omg thank you all am for 115 followers!? I'm amazed, absolutely stunned I didn't think I'd get this far like ever.

>>Also I absolutely despise that the definition visibility settings were moved to a different place- it took me like thirty minutes to find them again.

>> As always, I don't control what the bot says or does, if you are unsatisfied with the response given, please edit it or generate a new response.

>>Here is my Kofi if you feel like donating, and here is my request list!
